title: Framework as a CLI tool — distribution via curl|sh + docs.conf, not npm
description: Ship the framework as a standalone tool (curl|sh installable Rust binary), with three usage methods — CLI, manual clone, Docker — that all converge on the same underlying flow. Replaces the previous 'framework as npm package' direction. Brainstorm captured in agent-log/001; subtasks and decisions to be cherry-picked from 2026-04-25-framework-as-npm-package and 2025-06-25-deployment as they firm up.
author: sidhantha
